rules:
Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a Supporter card. Put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

attacks.name: Split Bomb
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Scorching Fire
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

rules:
Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Plasma Gale
attacks.effect: Discard a Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you can't discard a Plasma Energy, this attack does nothing.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Righteous Edge
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Steel Bullet
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Frost Prison
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Turbo Energize
attacks.effect: Search your deck for 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Intensifying Burn
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 50 more damage.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

If this card is attached to Victini-EX, Victini-EX can use its attacks regardless of the amount or type of Energy attached to it.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

You can't have more than 1 ACE SPEC card in your deck.

Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, you may move as many Energy attached to the old Active Pokémon to the new Active Pokémon as you like.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

You can't have more than 1 ACE SPEC card in your deck.

Discard 2 cards from your hand. (If you can't discard 2 cards, you can't play this card.) Put a Trainer card from your discard pile into your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

You can't have more than 1 ACE SPEC card in your deck.
This card provides Colorless Energy.

Put 2 more damage counters on Poisoned Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) between turns.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Discard a Team Plasma card from your card. (if you can't discard a Team Plasma card, you can't play this card.) Draw 4 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Each Pokémon that has any Plasma Energy attached to it (both yours and your opponent's) has no Weakness.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is also Asleep.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

If the Pokémon this card is attached to is a Basic Pokémon, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Reveal the top card of your deck. If that card is a basic Energy card, attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. If it is not a basic Energy card, return it to the top of your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Each player switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon. (Your opponent switches first. If a player does not have a Benched Pokémon, he or she doesn't switch Pokémon.)

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for a Plasma Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Team Plasma Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Draw cards until you have 4 cards in your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Wild Edge
attacks.effect: You may do 20 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: The more scars they have, the more respect these brave soldiers of the sky get from their peers.

attacks.name: Incessant Peck
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: It stands up to massive opponents, not out of courage, but out of recklessness. But that is how it gets stronger.

attacks.name: Tool Breaker
attacks.effect: Discard a Pokémon Tool card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: They are known to charge so wildly that if a train were to enter their territory, they would send it flying.

attacks.name: Second Bite
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.

attacks.name: Fast Swipe
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Biting Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Extremely cautious, there is always one keeping watch, but they don't notice enemies coming from behind.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won't notice a foe coming from behind.

attacks.name: Triple Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It shows its cute side by chasing its own tail until it gets dizzy.

attacks.name: Plasma Gale
attacks.effect: Discard a Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you can't discard a Plasma Energy, this attack does nothing.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Destructive Sound
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. Discard all Item cards you find there.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: Does 50 damage times the number of your Pokémon that have the Round attack.

flavorText: Its howls can be heard over six miles away. It emits all sorts of noises from the ports on its body.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: The shock waves from its cries can tip over trucks. It stamps its feet to power up.

attacks.name: Shout
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavorText: Usually, its cries are like quiet murmurs. If frightened, it shrieks at the same volume as a jet plane.

attacks.name: Return
attacks.effect: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

flavorText: It shares many blessings with people who respect one another's rights and avoid needless strife.

attacks.name: Sweet Kiss
attacks.effect: Your opponent draws a card.

flavorText: To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind-hearted people.

attacks.name: Yawn
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It transforms the kindness and joy of others into happiness, which it stores in its shell.

attacks.name: Teampact
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage times the number of Team Plasma Pokémon you have in play.

flavorText: When its belly is full, it becomes too lethargic to even lift a finger, so it is safe to bounce on its belly.

attacks.name: Raging Pecks
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads. This Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: When Doduo evolves into this odd breed, one of its heads splits into two. It runs at nearly 40 mph.

attacks.name: Gatling Peck
attacks.effect: Flip 5 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with telepathic power.
Their ears are sensitive enough to hear a pin drop from over a mile away, so they're usually found in quiet places.

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: On nights with a full moon, Clefairy gather from all over and dance. Bathing in moonlight makes them float.

attacks.name: White Inferno
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Black Ballista
attacks.effect: Discard 3 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It runs through the narrow tunnels formed by Excadrill and Onix. It uses its sharp claws to catch prey.

attacks.name: Righteous Edge
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Steel Bullet
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Call for Backup
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Metal Jail
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Individuals each play different roles in driving Heatmor, their natural predator, away from their colony.

attacks.name: Hard Crunch
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Individuals each play different roles in driving Heatmor, their natural predator, away from their colony.

attacks.name: Heavy Bullet
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: The minigear spins at high speed. Then the energy from the red core charges the minigear to make it ready to fire.

attacks.name: Gear Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: A minigear and big gear comprises its body. If the minigear it launches at its foe doesn't return, it will die.

attacks.name: Rigidify
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Two bodies comprise a fixed pair. They spin around each other to generate energy.

attacks.name: Cargo Jet
attacks.effect: Discard a Team Plasma card from your hand. if you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Steel Wing
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Its heavy-looking iron body is actually thin and light, so it can fly at speeds over 180 mph.

attacks.name: Kick Away
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Reinforced Headbutt
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: It pulls up its shed skin to protect itself while it kicks. The bigger the crest, the more respected it is.
Proud of its sturdy skull, it suddenly headbutts everything, but its weight makes it unstable, too.

attacks.name: Silent Claw
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveal his or her hand. Discard a Supporter card you find there. Use the effect of that card as the effect of this attack.

attacks.name: Fake Out
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Their beautiful form comes from the muscles they have developed. They run silently in the night.

attacks.name: Scout
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand.

attacks.name: Fasten Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Their cute act is a ruse. They trick people and steal their valuables just to see the looks on their faces.

attacks.name: Tail Trickery
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Its cute act is a ruse. When victims let down their guard, they find their items taken. It attacks with sharp claws.

attacks.name: Facade
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon is Burned or Poisoned, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Drain Punch
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.

attacks.name: Dynamic Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: With strengthened bodies, they skillfully wield steel beams to take down buildings.

attacks.name: Knock Back
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.

attacks.name: Hurricane Kick
attacks.effect: Does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

flavorText: By reading the auras of all things, it can tell how others are feeling from over half a mile away.
A well-trained one can sense auras to identify and take in the feelings of creatures over half a mile away.

attacks.name: Feint
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: They communicate with one another using their auras made tangible by their emotions.
It has the peculiar power of being able to see emotions such as joy and rage in the form of waves.

attacks.name: Heat Burn
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Explosion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 90 damage to itself.

flavorText: Solar energy is the source of its power, so it is strong during the daytime. When it spins, its body shines.
The phase of the moon apparently has some effect on its power. It's active on the night of a full moon.

attacks.name: Spinning Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Wreck
attacks.effect: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 60 more damage. Discard the Stadium card.

flavorText: It attacks by curling up, then rolling into its foe. It can blow apart a house in one hit.
It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.

attacks.name: Lock Up
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Damakinesis
attacks.effect: Move 6 damage counters from any of your Pokémon to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three fingers, but those patterns haven't been decoded.

attacks.name: Reflect
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Smash Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Rumors of its origin are linked to a UFO crash site in the desert 50 years ago.
Rumors of its origin are linked to a UFO crash site in the desert 50 years ago.

attacks.name: Ensnarl
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of Colorless in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Double Ducts
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Consuming garbage makes new kinds of poison gases and liquids inside their bodies.

attacks.name: Biosmog
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to that Pokémon.

flavorText: Consuming garbage makes new kinds of poison gases and liquids inside their bodies.

attacks.name: Tool Drop
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage for each Pokémon Tool card attached to Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's).

flavorText: Wanting more garbage, they follow people who litter. They always belch poison gas.
Wanting more garbage, they follow people who litter. They always belch poison gas.

attacks.name: Pile Up
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon Tool card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: The combination of garbage bags and industrial waste caused the chemical reaction that created this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hex
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Shadow Claw
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavorText: It was banished for its violence. It silently gazed upon the old world from the Distortion World.

attacks.name: Powerful Storm
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Swift Lunge
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: When trying to protect someone, it extends its elbows as if they were swords and fights savagely.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: If its Trainer becomes happy, it overflows with energy, dancing joyously while spinning about.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly.

attacks.name: Smogbank
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Inhaling toxic fumes from trash and mixing them inside its body lets it spread an even fouler stench.

attacks.name: Smokescreen
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

flavorText: Toxic gas is held within its thin, balloon-shaped body, so it can cause massive explosions.

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Toxic gas is held within its thin, balloon-shaped body, so it can cause massive explosions.

attacks.name: Ultra-Toxic Fang
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 4 damage counters instead of 1 on this Pokémon between turns.

flavorText: Having four wings allows it to fly more quickly and quietly so it can sneak up on prey without its noticing.

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Flitting around in the dead of night, it sinks its fangs into its prey and drains a nearly fatal amount of blood.
It does not need eyes, because it emits ultrasonic waves to check its surrounding while it flies.

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It does not need eyes, because it emits ultrasonic waves to check its surrounding while it flies.

attacks.name: Discharge
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage times the number of Energy cards you discarded.

attacks.name: Signal Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It creates barriers from electrified silk that stun foes. This works as a weapon as well as a defense.

attacks.name: Jump On
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Since it can't generate its own electricity, it sticks onto large-bodied Pokémon and absorbs static electricity.

attacks.name: Electribonus
attacks.effect: Discard a Lightning Energy card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Poltergeist
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. This attack does 20 damage times the number of Trainer cards in your opponent's hand.

flavorText: Its electric-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Powervolt
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.effect: Attach 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tumbling Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Sometimes the magnetism emitted by Magnezone is too strong, making them attract each other so they cannot move.

attacks.name: Gyro Ball
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Sometimes the magnetism emitted by Magnezone is too strong, making them attract each other so they cannot move.

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: The stronger electromagnetic waves from the three linked Magnemite are enough to dry out surrounding moisture.

attacks.name: Metal Sound
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: The stronger electromagnetic waves from the three linked Magnemite are enough to dry out surrounding moisture.
The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

attacks.name: Metal Sound
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

attacks.name: Powerful Rage
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Glacier Drop
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways around the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.

attacks.name: Hail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Their snot is a barometer of health. When healthy, their snot is sticky and the power of their ice moves increases.

attacks.name: Aqua Bullet
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Its body is mostly seawater. It's said there's a castle of ships Jellicent have sunk on the seafloor.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: If its veil-like arms stun and wrap a foe, that foe will be dragged miles below the surface, never to return.

attacks.name: Enefountain
attacks.effect: Attach 2 basic Energy cards from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and, when angry, cause violent blizzards.
They cool down the surrounding air and create ice particles, which they use to freeze their foes.

attacks.name: Snow Squall
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: Theoretically, this Pokémon formed from icicles bathed in energy from the morning sun. Their breath is -58° F.

attacks.name: Seafaring
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, attach a Water Energy card from your discard pile to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hard Bite
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Its fangs rip through sheet iron. It swims at 75 mph and is known as
They swarm any foe that invades their territory. Their sharp fangs can tear out boat hulls.

attacks.name: Groovy Dance
attacks.effect: You may discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: If it hears festive music, all its muscles fill with energy. It can't help breaking out into a dance.

attacks.name: Jump On
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: It has a mischievous spirit. If it spots an angler, it will tug on the fishing line to interfere.

attacks.name: Bubble Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It looks like an aquatic plant and serves as a ferry to Pokémon that can't swim.

attacks.name: Frost Stone
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Continuous Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 90 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: When the temperature rose at the end of the ice age, most Mamoswine disappeared.

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Quintuple Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip 5 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: With its excellent sense of smell, it's even able to find mushrooms that are buried under frozen ground.

attacks.name: Double Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Rooting the tip of its snout into the ground, it searches for food. Sometimes, it even digs up a hot spring.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Frost Prison
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It shelters itself in its shell, then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.

attacks.name: Luring Flame
attacks.effect: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with the Defending Pokémon. The new Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Fiery Licks
attacks.effect: Discard the top 4 cards of your deck. This attack does 50 damage times the number of Fire Energy cards discarded.

flavorText: It draws in air through its tail, transforms it into fire, and uses it like a tongue. It melts Durant and eats them.
The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Its flame is usually out, but it starts shining when it absorbs life force from people or Pokémon.

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Flame Blast
attacks.effect: Does 20 more damage for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.

attacks.name: Double Fire
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Very intelligent, it roasts berries before eating them. It likes to help people.

attacks.name: Turbo Energize
attacks.effect: Search your deck for 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Intensifying Burn
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Torment
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attack. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Malevolent Fire
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It uses unique fighting moves with fire on its hand and feet. It will take on any opponent.

attacks.name: Loud Howl
attacks.effect: Your opponent Switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fire Tail Slap
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It skillfully controls the intensity of the fire on its tail to keep its foes at an ideal distance.
It is very agile. Before going to sleep, it extinguishes the flame on its tail to prevent fires.

attacks.name: Destructive Flame
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Power Flame
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, this attack does 40 more damage.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Miracle Powder
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a Special Condition. The Defending Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.

flavorText: It moves the caps on both arms and does a dance to lure prey. It prefers damp places.

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into his or her deck.

flavorText: It lures Pokémon with its pattern that looks just like a Poké Ball then releases poison spores.

attacks.name: Dazzle Dance
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: When it moves rhythmically, it makes a sound similar to maracas, making the surprised Pokémon flee.

attacks.name: Cleave
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, discard all Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.

attacks.name: Swaddle Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 40 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Preferring dark, damp places, it spends the entire day eating fallen leaves that lie around it.
Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.

attacks.name: Random Peck
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: If it senses strong sunlight, it opens its folded petals to absorb the sun's rays with its whole body.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. Starly try to peck it off.

attacks.name: Gather Order
attacks.effect: Search your deck for as many Combee as you like and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Damage Beat
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.

attacks.name: Sting Missile
attacks.effect: Shuffle this Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your deck.

flavorText: This Pokémon is a set of three. When they sleep, they gather up and form a giant hive of 100 Combee.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Rumble Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: Some Pokémon are born on a Torterra's back and spend their entire life there.

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: It knows where pure water wells up. It carries fellow Pokémon there on its back.

attacks.name: Nap
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: The shell on its back is made of soil. On a very healthy Turtwig, the shell should feel moist.
